title: Project scaffolding + shared UI patterns

task.description: Create Next.js 15 App Router skeleton in src/ with strict TS, Tailwind v4, and shared UI patterns: LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, FormField. Add basic layout + placeholder protected page.
acceptance_criteria: App builds and runs with TypeScript strict and Tailwind styles applied.
Global layout renders nav placeholder (Home/Train/Generate/History) and a logged-in/out placeholder.
Shared components render correct states: loading skeleton, error banner + retry button, empty icon+heading+CTA link.
FormField shows label, child input, and inline error text.
Visiting a placeholder protected route shows a stub that will later be guarded (no auth yet).

definition_of_done: All shared state components used at least once in a page
ui_requirements: Layout: max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6. Use Card for page sections, Button variants, Input/Textarea in FormField. States: LoadingState skeleton, ErrorState banner w/ retry, EmptyState w/ CTA. Colors use CSS vars.
